calendar.matters:
First Report And Account Of Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement And Approval
Off Calendar Jun-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Bridgman, via Zoom, for and with FE Thibodeaux and Paz Rodriguez, Objectors; Mark Senick, via Zoom, for Manuela Ramirez, co-Trustee; Deb Fox, via Zoom, for Cres Ramirez, co-Trustee.

The court queries Mr. Bridgman whether he is objecting to the accounting in the Bypass Trust. Mr. Bridgman reports that he has not received an accounting since August of 2021 and does not know the status of the trust accounts since then but that he does not object to the accounting in the Bypass Trust. Mr. Senick reports of complying with court orders regarding accountings and has served Mr. Bridgman accordingly. Mr. Sencik reports of having additional accountings to file and will request distributions at the time of filing. The court points to its intent to reduce the 2018 trustee fees requested in the instant petition. Mr. Selnick offers advocacy on behalf of the trustee regarding the fees being requested.

The court takes the matters under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

First Report And Account Of Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement And Approval
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
